jsonLd.title: Gati is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
